name: Mid-South Payday and Title Loans merged with 745Cash at 4664 Summer Ave
description_short: Unable to verify current business operations. Website returns 403 Forbidden error, preventing access to service details, rates, and company information.
description_long: Mid-South Payday and Title Loans merged with 745Cash at 4664 Summer Ave, positioning itself as an emergency cash lender in the Memphis area. The company was historically categorized under emergency-cash services, suggesting it offered small fast loans and title-based lending products. However, verification of current operations cannot be completed due to website accessibility issues. The listed website (https://745cash.com) returns a 403 Forbidden error, blocking access to loan terms, APR rates, eligibility requirements, and other critical consumer information. This technical barrier prevents independent verification of the company's current service offerings, lending practices, or operational status. Without accessible company information, potential borrowers cannot confirm whether the business remains active, what specific loan products are available, or what terms and conditions apply to borrowing. The merger history suggests the company operates in the payday and title loan space, but current details cannot be independently verified.
